what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG outline icon showing a calendar with a plus sign, using currentColor for stroke styling.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox.
The icon is drawn with no fill and currentColor stroke.
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
A rounded rectangle forms the calendar body.
Separate paths draw the calendar header line, binding tabs, and centered plus sign.
standouts: Calendar and add affordances are combined in a single compact glyph.
The icon is themeable through currentColor.
The markup is minimal and consists only of SVG shape elements.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions with fill="none", stroke="currentColor", rounded caps, and rounded joins.
Uses a 24x24 coordinate system typical for UI icon sets.
Uses simple rect and path elements without embedded styling classes.
notes: This file is a reusable calendar-add outline icon asset.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename implies a calendar-add icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a compact, color-inheriting icon for an action that adds a calendar item or date.
contribution: Provides a reusable currentColor SVG glyph combining calendar structure with an add symbol for use in a fused design asset set.
summary_for_embedding: An SVG outline icon asset depicting a calendar with a plus sign, using a 24x24 viewBox and currentColor stroke styling.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing an add-to-calendar or create-calendar-item action in a UI icon set.
